dimensions.criterion: Output defaults to mode=dry-run; no write occurs without explicit --apply.
dimensions.fail_if: A profile was written while mode=dry-run or without an explicit apply flag.

dimensions.criterion: Every credential shape is rejected, named by category, redacted; no secret reaches the plan body.
dimensions.fail_if: A token, password, private key, bearer header, raw email, or credentialed connection string appears in the plan or is echoed back.

dimensions.criterion: An existing profile is preserved unless --force was passed; otherwise preview + exact --force command returned.
Validation runs with no network, clock, or randomness and is reproducible.
dimensions.fail_if: Validation required a live API, wall-clock time, or randomness.

dimensions.criterion: command_policy has allowed/prohibited/escalation-required; privacy_policy and write_policy present; no silent permission widening.
dimensions.fail_if: A policy class is missing or a permission was widened without escalation-required.

dimensions.criterion: .gitignore covers .jm-adk.local.json; never written into a git-tracked path.
dimensions.fail_if: The target file is not gitignored or lands in a tracked path.

dimensions.criterion: Single Alfa-core tag family (CODE/CONFIG/DOC/INFERENCE/ASSUMPTION), consistent spelling; single brand; no prices; no PII.
dimensions.fail_if: Jarvis {...} tags mixed in, multiple brands, invented prices, or PII present.

note: Every dimension is a hard gate; a single fail blocks apply. Score is for reporting only, not for waiving a failed gate.
